hooks.command: input=$(cat); [ "$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.stop_hook_active // false')" = "true" ] && exit 0; out=$(rsconstruct build 2>&1); [ $? -eq 0 ] && exit 0; printf '%s' "$out" | jq -Rs '{decision:"block", reason:("rsconstruct build FAILED. Do not stop until it passes. Fix these errors and rebuild:\n" + .)}'
